title: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion Causing Service Unavailability
description: Wantong Logistics (CUS-1401) urgent report: Starting 10:00 AM today, the warehouse management system is frequently reporting 'Cannot acquire database connection' errors, massive request timeouts. Currently the entire warehouse dispatch module is unavailable, affecting real-time scheduling for over 200 warehouses, logistics delivery severely delayed. Customer demands immediate resolution.

title: Report Loading Slow
description: Hanhai E-Commerce (CUS-1402) reports monthly sales report loading time exceeds 60 seconds, occasionally timing out. Affecting daily operational analysis.

title: Permission Configuration Issue
description: Qianfeng Tech (CUS-1403) admin reports some employee permissions are incorrectly configured, newly created role templates cannot be properly assigned to user groups.

title: API Interface Intermittent Timeout
description: Dingxin Software (CUS-1404) development team reports order query API intermittently times out during peak hours, averaging 3-5 occurrences per hour, affecting their integration system stability.

title: Feature Request: Batch Export Support
description: Sunlight Media (CUS-1405) suggests adding batch report export functionality; currently reports can only be downloaded one at a time.
